Container.Name: catalog-api
Container.Overview: Source-of-truth catalog and state API. Tracks all media items, arr lock state, and review queue entries. All other services report back to this API.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: catalog-api HTTP port. Access Swagger docs at /docs.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent data directory. SQLite database is stored here.

Config.Name: CATALOG_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path inside container to the SQLite database file.
